tasks.title: Globalize remaining SuperRoo learning surfaces
tasks.summary: Moved Codex Brain memory defaults to ~/.superroo, installed global superroo-learn and git hooks, mirrored task logs, commit/deploy logs, lesson markdown, bugs/features/model decisions, Claude/Codex/Ollama/competitor memories, added global wrappers for sync-all-brains and lesson quality commands, and verified global local fallback. Remote Central Brain sync remains blocked by VPS PostgreSQL connection failure.
notes: Codex Brain status now reports memoryPath under C:/Users/user/.superroo/memory/codex-brain/memory.json.
Global git core.hooksPath now points to C:/Users/user/.superroo/git-hooks.

Full sync-all-brains promoted seeded Codex Brain lessons back into canonical, increasing lesson-index rows from 395 to 805; append-only guard passed, and sync-all-brains was patched to skip seeded lesson-index entries in future promotions.
Remote Central Brain sync failed because the API returned 503: BugKnowledgeStore not ready, PostgreSQL refused 127.0.0.1:5432.

tasks.title: Make Codex Brain global and persistent
tasks.summary: Added a repeatable global Codex Brain installer that writes user-level Codex config, global AGENTS instructions, a Codex Brain user skill, SuperRoo workflow/resources, MCP config exports, and command wrappers in ~/.superroo/bin. Added the global bin directory to the user PATH and verified the wrappers from outside the repo.
notes: The installer is idempotent and rewrites only managed global blocks/files.
The global user PATH now includes C:/Users/user/.superroo/bin for future terminals.
Wrapper smoke tests passed from C:/Users/user, outside the superroo2 repo.

tasks.title: Wire Codex Brain MCP and agent RAG upgrades
tasks.summary: Added a Codex Brain MCP wrapper around the local Ollama-backed Codex Brain CLI, wired it into MCP and Kilo agent configs, upgraded Central Brain fallback search to hybrid BM25/vector/RRF, documented the no-DeepSeek Codex Brain workflow, and blocked Claude memory deletion with append-only guardrails.
notes: DeepSeek was not used for this task per user instruction.
Codex Brain MCP exposes retrieve, collect, code, recall, remember, and outcome tools over JSON-RPC.
All Kilo agents now declare codex-brain MCP access in addition to Central Brain.
Claude's local forget tool is blocked and instructs agents to append corrective lessons instead of deleting memory.

tasks.title: Unify local extension lessons with append-only guardrails
tasks.summary: Added an append-only local extension lesson consolidator for Claude, Codex, and Kilo lesson sources; added a guard script and pre-commit hook to block edits, deletes, rewrites, or reorders of existing canonical lesson files; synced one new Codex local lesson into the learning layer and Codex Brain. VPS sync was attempted but the public API returned 502 and the Tailscale API fetch failed from this machine.
notes: Local consolidation found 35 extension candidates, skipped 34 duplicates, and appended 1 new Codex lesson.
Append-only guard passed against the current working tree for memory/lessons-learned.md and memory/lesson-index.jsonl.
VPS sync has 3 pending lessons but failed: https://dev.abcx124.xyz/api returned 502 and http://100.64.175.88:8787 fetch failed.

tasks.title: Sync learning lessons into Codex Brain
tasks.summary: Attempted to pull all VPS Central Brain lessons into the local SuperRoo learning layer, but the live /lessons/export endpoint returned HTTP 401 and Tailscale SSH failed because the documented id_superroo_vps key is not present locally. Added deduped full-index seeding to Codex Brain and embedded all available local SuperRoo lessons into memory/codex-brain/memory.json.
notes: VPS API health endpoint on 100.64.175.88:8787 is reachable, but /lessons/export returns 401.
SSH to root@100.64.175.88 is reachable but denied publickey because C:\Users\User\.ssh\id_superroo_vps is not present.
Local lesson-index has 387 valid rows and 383 unique lesson IDs; four duplicate IDs were skipped during Codex Brain seeding.
Codex Brain now has 384 total memories, including 383 unique SuperRoo lesson memories.

tasks.title: Create Codex Brain wrapper
tasks.summary: Added a repo-local Codex Brain CLI that calls local Ollama models as researcher, analyst, retriever, context collector, reviewer, and coder agents. It stores Codex-owned hybrid memory in memory/codex-brain/memory.json, supports lesson seeding, retrieval, collection, code/code-pro/code-verified/code-with-memory commands, and documents the workflow.
notes: Local Ollama at 127.0.0.1:11434 is healthy with hermes3, nomic-embed-text, qwen2.5-coder:7b, qwen2.5-coder:14b, qwen3:14b, phi4, and llava:7b.
Smoke checks verified status, remember, recall, collections, and fast code generation.

tasks.title: Adjust Ollama 0.24 compatibility
tasks.summary: Updated Ollama defaults for the live VPS 0.24.0 model set, added modern /api/embed handling with legacy /api/embeddings fallback, fixed the Ollama MCP ESM readline startup bug, and made agent context summarization bounded so it completes instead of timing out.
notes: Live VPS Ollama reports version 0.24.0 with hermes3, qwen2.5:1.5b, and nomic-embed-text:latest.
Local Windows PATH does not expose the ollama CLI, so verification used Tailscale HTTP probes.

tasks.title: Improve workflow compliance dashboard
tasks.summary: Added compliance tracking diagnostics, service health visibility, and deploy verification improvements; restored the missing VPS API/dashboard processes and verified live recovery.
notes: Production dashboard/API were restarted on the VPS and public dashboard returned HTTP 200 afterward.
Full dashboard tsc remains blocked locally by the existing missing next package resolution issue.

tasks.title: Release learning layer workflow
tasks.summary: Committed the learning-layer gateway, curation workflow, outcome-aware ranking, and fallback bootstrap fix; verified and deployed as part of Sprint 3+4 deploy.
notes: Code was already committed in 241e097ed and 279008ef4. Marking completed now before Sprint 5 deploy.

tasks.title: Fix extension TS errors - Express v5 types, OllamaPipeline, test mocks
tasks.summary: Fixed 5 categories of TS errors blocking the VSIX build: (1) OllamaPipeline missing codexBrief/deepseekTask fields - wired up builders and added fields to result type. (2) CodexBriefBuilder circular ref summary.codexBrief - replaced with summary.rawModelOutput. (3) DeepSeekTaskBuilder ref summary.deepseekTask - replaced with summary.suggestedFix. (4) ClineProvider.spec.ts read-only onDidChangeVisibility - fixed with Object.defineProperty. (5) Express v5 req.params typed as string|string[] - fixed all route handlers with Request<{param:string}> generics. Also installed express + @types/express. VSIX 3.53.2 built and installed.

tasks.title: Add SuperRoo webview visibility refresh
tasks.summary: Added a soft recovery refresh when the webview becomes visible again plus an immediate unhydrated handshake retry on document visibility changes.
notes: Switching away from and back to the SuperRoo view now triggers a state resend without destructive reload.
VS Code still needs one reload after VSIX reinstall before this new behavior is active.

tasks.title: Fix SuperRoo webview blackout and finish MCP handoff
tasks.summary: Fixed launch hydration so custom-mode load failures no longer leave the UI blank, added visible loading state, verified focused tests, and reinstalled the repaired VSIX.
notes: Current Codex host session still needs reload to attach the newly configured MCP server.
Installed extension refreshed at 2026-05-17 17:12 local time; VS Code restart/window reload required to load it.

tasks.title: Wire Codex task memory
